expectedVsObserved.expected: This test procedure validates the core interactive elements of the portfolio website, including navbar smooth-scroll, theme toggle, skills filter, project card hover, contact form validation, and back-to-top button behavior. It aims to detect and report any broken elements without attempting to fix them.

issues.evidence: A wait step is missing from executed sequence.
issues.fix: Include a wait step (>= 10 seconds) before post-observation assertions.
